response.global_analysis: 1. Lyrics Match: Handled alignment with Reference JSON containing the song lyrics. 2. JSON Usage: Fully used the provided lyrics for high-accuracy translation and disambiguation. 3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles are precisely aligned to Momosuzu Nene's vocal performance, incorporating natural pauses and breaks between musical sections. Let the subtitles flow across lines logically to capture the emotional build-up.

subtitles.original: この道はそう
subtitles.english: This road is, yes...

subtitles.original: 未来へ続く道
subtitles.english: ...a road that continues into the future.

subtitles.original: そんな気がしたの
subtitles.english: That's what I felt.

subtitles.original: 例年より早い開花予想を
subtitles.english: The early blooming forecast...

subtitles.original: 君は嬉しがってた
subtitles.english: ...you were so happy about it.

subtitles.original: 私は笑って「そうだね」って言った
subtitles.english: I laughed and said, "Yeah, it is."

subtitles.original: あと少ししたらもうここには戻れないのに
subtitles.english: Even though soon, we won't be able to return here.

subtitles.original: 言葉じゃうまく言えない想いを
subtitles.english: If I were to confess these feelings...

subtitles.original: 君に打ち明けるとしたらなんて
subtitles.english: ...that I can't put into words well...

subtitles.original: 伝えよう
subtitles.english: How should I tell you?

subtitles.original: 最初で最後
subtitles.english: For the first and last time.

subtitles.original: いつか一緒に帰った道は
subtitles.english: The road we once walked home together...

subtitles.original: 私にとって特別な思い出
subtitles.english: ...is a special memory to me.

subtitles.original: 忘れないよさよならメモリーズ
subtitles.english: I won't forget you, Sayonara Memories.

subtitles.original: 春が来たら
subtitles.english: When spring comes...

subtitles.original: それぞれの道へ
subtitles.english: ...we'll go our separate ways.

subtitles.original: また会える日を願って
subtitles.english: Wishing for the day we can meet again.

subtitles.original: さよなら
subtitles.english: "Goodbye..."

subtitles.original: 小さくつぶやいた
subtitles.english: ...I whispered softly.

subtitles.original: 空はあの日と変わらず
subtitles.english: The sky is just like that day...

subtitles.original: 青くて
subtitles.english: ...ever so blue.

subtitles.original: だからちょっと泣けた
subtitles.english: So I teared up a little.

subtitles.original: わざと遠回りしたの
subtitles.english: I took the long way home on purpose...

subtitles.original: 少しでも長く君の隣にいたくて
subtitles.english: ...because I wanted to be by your side for just a little longer.

subtitles.original: 私はおどけて「まちがえた！」って言った
subtitles.english: I joked and said, "I made a mistake!"

subtitles.original: 君は笑うその顔が
subtitles.english: Your face when you laughed...

subtitles.original: 眩しくて
subtitles.english: ...was so dazzling...

subtitles.original: 目をそらした
subtitles.english: ...that I looked away.

subtitles.original: 言葉じゃうまく言えない想いを
subtitles.english: Holding these feelings I can't put into words well...

subtitles.original: 胸に抱いてこの道を歩いた
subtitles.english: ...in my chest, I walked down this road.

subtitles.original: 覚えてるあの時君は
subtitles.english: Do you remember? At that time, you...

subtitles.original: 私の名前を呼んでくれた
subtitles.english: ...called my name.

subtitles.original: 二人夕暮れの帰り道で
subtitles.english: On the way home, just the two of us at dusk.

subtitles.original: 忘れないよさよならメモリーズ
subtitles.english: I won't forget you, Sayonara Memories.

subtitles.original: 出会えたこと感謝してる
subtitles.english: I'm grateful that I met you.

subtitles.original: 初めて見た満開の桜
subtitles.english: The first time I saw the cherry blossoms in full bloom.

subtitles.original: あれからどれくらい変われたんだろう
subtitles.english: How much have I changed since then?

subtitles.original: 一目見た時に思ったんだ
subtitles.english: The moment I saw you, I thought...

subtitles.original: この人の事好きになりそうって
subtitles.english: ...I'm going to fall in love with you.

subtitles.original: なんでかな？わかんないよ
subtitles.english: Why, I wonder? I don't know.

subtitles.original: それからの毎日はとても楽しくって
subtitles.english: The days since then were so much fun...

subtitles.original: だけど同じくらいに
subtitles.english: ...but they were just as...

subtitles.original: 辛かったんだ
subtitles.english: ...painful.

subtitles.original: ごめんねなんかうまく言えないよ
subtitles.english: I'm sorry, I can't say it well.

subtitles.original: だから私君となんていうか
subtitles.english: So, I... how should I say it...

subtitles.original: 今のままさよならしたくないの
subtitles.english: I don't want to say goodbye just like this.

subtitles.original: 友達のままじゃもう嫌なの
subtitles.english: I don't want to just be friends anymore.

subtitles.original: 言おうと思ってた
subtitles.english: I've been thinking of saying it, I have...

subtitles.original: 私君の
subtitles.english: ...about you...

subtitles.original: 君のことずっとずっと
subtitles.english: ...that I have, for a long, long time...

subtitles.original: 前から
subtitles.english: ...from before...

subtitles.original: 好きでした
subtitles.english: ...loved you.

subtitles.original: ああやっと言えた
subtitles.english: Ah, I finally said it.
